Class BloviateContainers.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.bloviate.testcontainers.BloviateContainers.Builder
Enclosing class:
BloviateContainers
public static final class BloviateContainers.Builder extends Object
Configures and runs a fill against a JdbcDatabaseContainer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    batchSize(int batchSize)
    Sets the JDBC batch size for INSERTs.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    databaseSupport(DatabaseSupport databaseSupport)
    Overrides the auto-detected DatabaseSupport.
    void
    fill()
    Opens a connection to the container and fills its schema.
    BloviateContainers.Builder

    Sets the default number of rows to generate per table.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    seed(long seed)
    Sets the base seed for reproducible generation.
    BloviateContainers.Builder

    Sets optional per-table overrides.

  • Method Details

    • batchSize

      public BloviateContainers.Builder batchSize(int batchSize)
      Sets the JDBC batch size for INSERTs.
      Parameters:
      batchSize - the JDBC batch size for INSERTs (default 1000)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • rows

      public BloviateContainers.Builder rows(long rows)
      Sets the default number of rows to generate per table.
      Parameters:
      rows - the default number of rows to generate per table (default 100)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • seed

      public BloviateContainers.Builder seed(long seed)
      Sets the base seed for reproducible generation.
      Parameters:
      seed - the base seed for reproducible generation (default 0); vary it for a different but reproducible dataset
      Returns:
      this builder

    • databaseSupport

      public BloviateContainers.Builder databaseSupport(DatabaseSupport databaseSupport)
      Overrides the auto-detected DatabaseSupport.
      Parameters:
      databaseSupport - the support to use, or null to auto-detect from the connection
      Returns:
      this builder

    • tableConfigurations

      public BloviateContainers.Builder tableConfigurations(Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations)
      Sets optional per-table overrides.
      Parameters:
      tableConfigurations - optional per-table overrides (row counts, column generators)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fill

      public void fill() throws SQLException
      Opens a connection to the container and fills its schema.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
